tool_args.label: Contract was competitively procured

tool_args.label: Equal cost sharing among Authorities

payload.description: Cost sharing arrangement for Amendment No. 3

evidence_refs.source_quote: B&T, PANYNJ, and NYSTA will equally share the cost under this contract, therefore B&T will be reimbursed two-thirds of the cost for this amendment by the other participating Authorities.
